name: claude-hooks-databases
tags: databases, SQLite, paths, MEMORY.sqlite, proj_tasks, checkpoints, server_memory, tool_hints, claude_hooks, iCloud
body:
All SQLite databases used by claude-hooks:

- ~/.claude/MEMORY.sqlite                                                        — long-term memories
- ~/.claude/proj_tasks.db                                                        — task store
- ~/.claude/langgraph_checkpoints.db                                             — SqliteSaver checkpoint store
- ~/.claude/server_memory.sqlite                                                 — ServerMemory durable store (rolling 1000-event window)
- ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Databases/tool_hints.sqlite    — MCP tool usage hints (iCloud)
- ~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Databases/claude_hooks.sqlite  — hook logs (iCloud)
